description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in a vibrant blue color. The back features a glossy surface with a prominent silver Apple logo centered and a dual-camera module with two lenses and a flash in the top left corner. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with a black bezel and a notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible button placements and antenna lines. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a slim profile and precise detailing. Its design is characteristic of recent Apple iPhone models, combining aesthetics with functionality for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek blue smartphone with a glossy back, dual rear cameras, and a large edge-to-edge display. Features a silver Apple logo and a modern, slim design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the glossy blue back, silver Apple logo, and dual camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the slim, flat metallic edge and subtle button placements.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large screen with a black bezel and top notch for sensors and the front camera.
description_view_3: Right side profile highlighting the flat edge and a visible button, likely the power button.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible and reflective.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue abstract wallpaper with concentric circles, no icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged diagonally in a raised square module at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on both the left and right edges; the left side likely has volume buttons and the right side has a power button.
